close_reason: Added _detect_channels unit coverage for mono/stereo edge cases
description: Wrong channel count corrupts downloaded WAVs. Heuristic at ko2_client.py:79-98 is untested. Fix: unit tests for mono/stereo detection with synthetic PCM. Effort: 2 hours.
title: TEST-002: Add _detect_channels tests

description: Device could be left in inconsistent state. Gaps: partial upload failure, rollback tests, mid-upload timeout. Effort: 1 day.
title: TEST-003: Add upload error recovery tests

description:
Prepare repository for public GitHub release:

1. Generate GIF/screenshots of TUI in action (ko2.py tui)
   - Show main interface, navigation, operations
   - Add to README.md

2. GitHub templates and packaging
   - Create .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/ for bug reports and feature requests
   - Verify requirements.txt is complete and correct
   - Test installation flow (pip install -r requirements.txt)
   - Verify all dependencies work on fresh install

3. Clean references to external repos
   - Remove rcy repo from git history/tracking
   - Keep only text mention in PROTOCOL.md references section
   - Remove direct links to reference repos (no need to notify owners yet)
   - Update .gitignore to exclude references/ directory

Deliverable: Repository ready for public GitHub push with professional presentation.
title: GitHub publication prep: TUI media, templates, packaging

description: Hardcoded values: 64MB memory assumption (ko2.py:455, app.py:541), 5KB savings threshold (ko2.py:802,931), audio2ko2 path (ko2.py:697). Fix: YAML/TOML config file. See ui.py:234 TODO. Effort: 1 day.
title: ARCH-006: Add configuration file support

description: 400+ lines of argparse in main() at ko2.py:1618-2021. Move to ko2/parser.py. Effort: 4 hours.
title: ARCH-005: Extract argparse to separate file

description: Users expect sortable tables. Scope: column header click sorting, sorted mode that disables move/copy to empty slots, preserve slot integrity. Effort: Medium-High.
title: TUI-004: Sorting with in-place constraints

description: When popup opens focus must shift to it. Space toggles checkboxes, Enter confirms, Escape cancels. Broken: ConfirmModal (ui.py:194-220) no Enter; OptimizeModal (ui.py:223-270) no Enter/Space/Escape. Fix: add bindings + call focus() on modal open. Effort: 2 hours.
title: TUI-001: Keyboard focus and bindings for optimize/confirm popups

description: Quick preview without download. Blocked by PROT-001 (playback protocol unknown). Scope: bind Tab to play selected non-empty slot, handle empty slot gracefully. Effort: Medium (after protocol captured).
title: TUI-006: Tab to play/audition sample

close_reason: Duplicate code between CLI and TUI worker was successfully extracted into the shared  (and ) service layer. Both CLI and TUI worker now call these functions directly.
description: Move/copy/squash/optimize logic duplicated between CLI (ko2.py:1007-1308) and TUI worker (worker.py, 754 lines as of 2026-03-06 refactor). Target: TransferService class in ko2/services/transfer.py. Effort: 2 days.
title: ARCH-002: Extract shared service layer

description: Missing from TUI (exists in CLI). action_optimize() only handles single slot/selection. Fix: add to optimize modal or separate keybinding. Effort: Low.
title: TUI-007: Batch optimize-all with progress in TUI

description: Progress hard to see; no prevention of conflicting ops; Escape doesn't cancel. Fix: more prominent progress display (overlay?), block UI during operations, research Escape cancellation scope. Effort: 1-2 days.
title: TUI-005: Progress bar visibility and operation blocking

description: probe_channels() sends DownloadInitRequest + one chunk then stops; device abandons after timeout. Currently safe (read-only audit loops only) but if ever called before delete()/put() could cause silent failure. Fix: add _initialize() at end, or add warning comment to all call sites. Effort: 30 min.
title: ARCH-009: Guard probe_channels() callers against partial-download state

description: False cache hits if same-named sample changes. Currently keyed by signature (name/size/channels/rate). Fix: use SHA256 fingerprint as primary key. Effort: Medium.
title: TUI-014: Waveform cache by content hash

description: We send 0x61, official app may send 0x78. May reveal skipped init steps. Action: python midi_proxy.py --proxy --spoof --hunt any captures/sniffer-startup.jsonl. From CAPTURE_WISHLIST.md item 7. Effort: 30 min.
title: PROT-006: Capture full session startup/INIT handshake

description: Mix of try/except with pass, silent failures. 141 matches for pass/return None patterns. Fix: define custom exception hierarchy, replace bare except:pass, add logging for suppressed errors. Effort: 1-2 days.
title: ARCH-007: Standardize error handling

description: Adversarial input coverage. Targets: random SysEx to parse_file_list_response, malformed JSON to _parse_json_tolerant. Effort: 1 day.
title: TEST-007: Add protocol fuzz tests

description: Device computer LED lights up even when all waveforms are computed and cache is fully populated. Fix: audit _ensure_waveform, probe_channels(), and precalc scheduler in app.py/worker.py; add early-return guard when WaveformStore.is_valid_bins(slot) is already true before queuing any device request. Effort: 1-2 hours.
title: TUI-021: Waveform cache hit still triggers device MIDI traffic

description: mv/move, cp/copy, rm/delete/remove have duplicated definitions. Fix: factory function for repeated patterns. Effort: 2 hours.
title: ARCH-008: Consolidate CLI command aliases

description:
Prepare repository for public GitHub release:

1. Generate GIF/screenshots of TUI in action (ko2.py tui)
   - Show main interface, navigation, operations
   - Add to README.md

2. GitHub templates and packaging
   - Create .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/ for bug reports and feature requests
   - Verify requirements.txt is complete and correct
   - Test installation flow (pip install -r requirements.txt)
   - Verify all dependencies work on fresh install

3. Clean references to external repos
   - Remove rcy repo from git history/tracking
   - Keep only text mention in PROTOCOL.md references section
   - Remove direct links to reference repos (no need to notify owners yet)
   - Update .gitignore to exclude references/ directory

Deliverable: Repository ready for public GitHub push with professional presentation.
title: GitHub publication prep: TUI media, templates, packaging

description: No way to view device memory/project info in TUI. cmd_status exists in CLI only. Fix: add 'i' binding for info/status modal. Effort: Low-Medium.
title: TUI-013: Status command in TUI

description: Switch documented but listing not captured. Blocks backup/restore, multi-project support. Action: python midi_proxy.py --proxy --spoof --hunt cmd=0x7C captures/sniffer-project-ops.jsonl. Effort: 30 min.
title: PROT-003: Capture Project Listing (0x7C)

description: cmd_optimize_all (130 lines), cmd_squash (126 lines), cmd_ls (133 lines) each doing too much. Extract scan phase, process phase, reporting. Effort: 1 day.
title: ARCH-004: Refactor long command functions

description: EP133Client.device_info() always returns None (ko2_client.py:380-387). Options: A) implement INFO (0x77/0x78) parsing; B) remove method, make 64MB fallback explicit. Introduced Feb 20 2026 (commit 5995544c). Effort: 2-4 hours.
title: PROT-002: Implement device_info() or remove stub

description: KO2TUIApp should be TUIApp or DeviceApp. DeviceWorker is already good. Research industry standards before implementing. Effort: 2-3 hours.
title: ARCH-003: Remove 'ko2_' prefix from class names

description: TX format, parameters, response completely unknown. Blocks Tab-to-play (TUI-006) and Phase 3. Action: python midi_proxy.py --proxy --spoof --hunt cmd=0x76 captures/sniffer-playback.jsonl. Effort: 30 min + analysis.
title: PROT-001: Capture Playback/Audition protocol (0x76)

description: No visibility into test coverage. Fix: pip install pytest-cov; pytest --cov=ko2_client --cov=ko2_models --cov=ko2_operations. Effort: 1 hour.
title: TEST-004: Add coverage reporting

description: Backup/restore, project sharing. Format fully documented in PPAK_FORMAT.md. EP133Project class sketched. No SysEx path found yet (may rely on USB Mass Storage). Effort: 2-3 days.
title: UTIL-001: .ppak Export/Import

description: Press Enter to load adds friction. Fix: option to auto-load on cursor movement with throttling. Trade-off: increased MIDI traffic. Effort: Medium.
title: TUI-010: Waveform auto-load option

description: Run: pytest tests/e2e/test_squash.py -v -m e2e. Verifies client.get() calling _initialize() after download fixes stale DELETE issue. Confirmed from tui-2026-03-03-042744.jsonl. Effort: 5 min (with hardware).
title: TEST-001: Verify squash/download fix on hardware

description: Used in optimize/move/copy but untested. Scope: backup file naming, backup directory creation, collision handling. Effort: 4 hours.
title: TEST-008: Add ko2_backup.py tests

description: Only Group A complete (9201-9212). B: 2 pads (9302,9311); C: 2 pads (9402,9411); D: 2 pads (9502,9506). Action: python midi_proxy.py --proxy --spoof --hunt meta_set --hunt meta_get captures/sniffer-padmap-BCD.jsonl. Effort: 1 hour.
title: PROT-005: Complete Pad Mapping Groups B/C/D

description: 999 slots with many empty is visual noise. Requirements: config to fold/collapse empty ranges, suggest unfold when walking into folded area, button/hotkey to toggle. Effort: Medium.
title: TUI-008: Fold empty sample areas

description: Need clarity on what emulator can do. Deliverables: document current capabilities, protocol coverage checklist, guide for adding new opcodes. Audit ko2_emulator.py. Effort: 4 hours.
title: EMU-001: Document emulator capabilities and roadmap

description: Enable hot-swap, deduplication, prevent data loss. SampleDatabase class, ko2 sync command CLI+TUI, SQLite schema, duplicate detection, unlimited library beyond 999 slots. See state.py:21 TODO. Effort: 3-5 days.
title: DATA-001: Central sample database with sync operation

description: Visible flicker, lost scroll position. _refresh_table() clears and rebuilds all 999 rows. Fix: use DataTable.add_row()/update_cell() for incremental updates. Effort: Medium.
title: TUI-009: Eliminate full table rebuild

description: Silent data loss risk. action_upload() directly queues request without checking if slot is occupied. Fix: check if target slot exists, show confirmation modal. Effort: 1 hour.
title: TUI-003: Upload overwrite warning

description: Cannot show accurate free memory; falls back to 64MB. Evidence: sniffer-slot22.jsonl event 59 shows free_space_in_bytes. Action: python midi_proxy.py --proxy --spoof --hunt any captures/sniffer-storage-stats.jsonl. Effort: 30 min.
title: PROT-004: Capture Memory/Storage Statistics

description: Prepare for open source release: clean git history, reorganize repo (separate protocol spec, main README), package as installable app, Homebrew tap, semantic versioning. Effort: 2-3 days.
title: META-001: Git history cleanup and repo prep for publishing

close_reason: ko2.py has been split into src/cli/ module commands and tests have been updated appropriately
description: 2072 lines in single file; functional but hard to navigate. Target: ko2/cli.py, ko2/commands/{ls,transfer,optimize,squash}.py, ko2/parser.py, ko2/helpers.py. Effort: 2-3 days.
title: ARCH-001: Split ko2.py into modules

description: Multi-slot selection hard to see. Fix: highlight selected rows with background color, show selection summary in panel/overlay, add select-all-filled shortcut. Effort: Medium.
title: TUI-011: Selection feedback enhancement

description: Swap preview is subtle. Fix: distinct highlight for source slot, show 'Move: 043 -> 087' in floating overlay, animate affected rows. Effort: Medium.
title: TUI-012: Move mode visual clarity
META-002: Rename CLI entry point ko2 → krate

description: Tests use hardcoded values. Targets: test_wire_robustness.py, test_cli_output.py error cases. Fix: use @pytest.mark.parametrize. Effort: 4 hours.
title: TEST-006: Parametrize existing tests

description: No Textual pilot tests for key interactions. Risk of regressions in keybinds, modal flows. Fix: test_tui_keybinds.py using Textual app.press() API. Effort: 1 day.
title: TEST-005: Add TUI widget tests

description: Once the GitHub remote is configured, run bd backup export-git to publish issues to the beads-backup branch. Consider hooking into pre-push so it runs automatically. Also document bd backup fetch-git in CONTRIBUTING.md for new contributors.
title: Set up bd backup export-git after GitHub repo creation

description: No discoverable keybinding help. Footer shows only active bindings in one hard-to-scan line. Fix: add ? or h key to display full keybinding reference modal as vertical list/table. Effort: 2-3 hours.
title: TUI-002: Keyboard help overlay
